meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kit: Scale Your Freelance AI Projects Faster
content.seo_description: Stop building from scratch. Use our SaaS starter kit, Antigravity, and Claude Code to ship professional, high-converting apps at record speed.
content.answer_block: Stop reinventing the wheel. By leveraging a production-ready SaaS starter kit combined with Antigravity for architecture and Claude Code for implementation, you eliminate boilerplate fatigue. This stack automates authentication, billing, and database schema, allowing you to focus purely on high-value business logic and rapid client delivery.
content.intro:
You’re stuck in the 'tutorial hell' of repetitive boilerplate, spending more time configuring Auth.js and Stripe webhooks than actually solving your client’s problems. Every project feels like starting from zero, eroding your profit margins and crushing your creative momentum. The difference between a struggling freelancer and a high-leverage AI builder is the infrastructure they carry.

Imagine a world where your core architecture is already battle-tested before you even take the discovery call. By integrating a modular SaaS starter kit with intelligent CLI-driven coding agents, you transform your workflow from manual labor into a systematic, repeatable machine. It’s time to stop coding and start shipping.

steps.title: Initialize the Modular Architecture
steps.description: Clone your base SaaS starter kit to establish a consistent, scalable foundation for all future client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the base SaaS starter kit, ensuring strict TypeScript configuration, Tailwind CSS integration, and modular folder structure for API routes.

steps.title: Automate Database Schema Design
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate type-safe Prisma schemas based on your client's specific data requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including User, Subscription, and Project entities with proper relational integrity.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Generate prisma/schema.prisma for a multi-tenant SaaS with user roles and subscription tiers.'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Authentication
steps.description: Secure your application endpoints by integrating pre-configured auth providers into the modular starter kit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure NextAuth.js with Google and GitHub providers, creating a custom middleware to protect private routes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Setup NextAuth with OAuth providers and protect /dashboard routes'

steps.title: Rapid UI Component Injection
steps.description: Inject professional, production-ready UI components into your dashboard to maintain a high-end aesthetic without manual CSS work.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive sidebar layout and a data-table component using Shadcn/UI and Lucide icons.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Create a responsive dashboard sidebar with Shadcn UI and Lucide icons'

steps.title: Continuous Deployment Integration
steps.description: Configure your CI/CD pipeline to automate testing and deployment for every git push.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for linting, testing, and deploying to Vercel upon merging to the main branch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate .github/workflows/deploy.yml for Vercel production deployment'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Core Utilities' library in your starter kit to share custom hooks across different client projects.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your API routes before you even write the business logic to ensure TDD compliance.
Standardize your environment variables naming convention across all projects to prevent configuration drift.
Leverage Antigravity to generate documentation comments automatically, saving you hours of technical writing.
Keep your starter kit updated by pulling from a 'upstream' repository weekly to incorporate the latest security patches.
content.next_steps: After completing your first build, document your custom component library to create your own internal 'component marketplace' for future clients.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate code and start delivering premium value to your clients. Gain the unfair advantage in the AI builder market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
